en.axim-hero-verse: "How beautiful are the feet of those who bring good news!" — Romans 10:15
en.axim-hero-desc: This August, Zoe Tirzah carries the Gospel to the historic coastal shores of Axim in Ghana's Western Region — evangelism, medical care, community service, and children's ministry all in one week of purpose.
en.axim-about-body1: Axim is one of Ghana's oldest towns, nestled on the beautiful Western coast. Despite its rich history, many communities here remain unreached by the full power of the Gospel — families who need healing, children who need hope, and hearts that are open to transformation.
en.axim-about-body2: Zoe Tirzah sees Axim as a strategic gateway — a city where planting deep roots for Christ can ripple out across the Western Region and beyond.
en.axim-pillars-h2: Four Pillars of the Axim Mission
en.axim-pillars-sub: Every activity is a deliberate act of love — meeting people where they are, spirit, soul, and body.
en.axim-pillar1-text: Open-air crusades, door-to-door outreach, and church services bringing the transforming message of Christ to every home in Axim.
en.axim-pillar2-text: Free health screenings, treatments, and medications provided by our volunteer medical team to underserved families and communities.
en.axim-pillar3-text: Distributing donated clothes, food, and essential supplies to families in need — practical love that opens hearts to the Gospel.
en.axim-pillar4-text: Dedicated children's programmes with music, Bible stories, activities, and teaching — nurturing the next generation of disciples.
en.axim-fund-body: Every cedi raised goes directly into Gospel materials, medical supplies, transport, accommodation, and community giving. Together we fund the mission.
en.axim-donate-sub: Choose an amount to support the mission. Every gift — big or small — directly funds lives being transformed.
en.axim-alt-register-sub: Join the team on the field
en.axim-clothes-sub: Our clothes and donations drive is actively collecting items for Axim families. Drop off before August 10th at any TAC branch near you.
en.axim-clothes-info-body: We are collecting new or gently-used clothing for men, women, and children, as well as shoes, bags, and household items. Every donation will be sorted, packed, and personally delivered to families in Axim during the mission week.
en.axim-dropoff-1: Any TAC (The Apostolic Church) Branch — Accra, Tema & Greater Accra
en.axim-gallery-sub: A glimpse of what Zoe Tirzah looks like in action — real communities, real transformation.
en.axim-vol-body: We are looking for passionate believers ready to serve in Axim for 9 days. Whether you're a preacher, doctor, teacher, or willing heart — there's a place for you on this team.
en.axim-vol-f1-sub: Preach, testify, and lead people to Christ on the streets and in homes.
en.axim-vol-f2-sub: Doctors, nurses, pharmacists — bring your skills to those who need them most.
en.axim-vol-f3-sub: Lead VBS sessions, games, stories, and songs that plant seeds for life.
en.axim-vol-f4-sub: Capture testimonies, photos, and stories to share the mission with the world.
en.axim-reg-sub: Fill in your details and we'll get in touch with everything you need to join the Axim 2026 Mission.
en.axim-form-role-default: How would you like to serve?
en.axim-form-note: We will contact you within 48 hours with next steps.
en.axim-reg-success-sub: We'll reach out within 48 hours with your next steps. God bless you!
en.axim-updates-sub: Stay informed as we prepare for Axim 2026. Every update brings us one step closer.
en.axim-update1-text: Drop off donations at any TAC branch before August 10th. New and gently-used clothing, shoes, and household items are all welcome. Tell your friends and family!
en.axim-update2-text: 23 missionaries have registered for the Axim 2026 Mission. Spots are limited — if you feel called to serve, don't wait. Register today!
en.axim-update3-text: We are assembling our medical volunteer team. If you are a doctor, nurse, pharmacist, or healthcare worker, we need you! Details dropping soon.
en.axim-update4-text: Our logistics team is finalising accommodation and transport arrangements for the journey to and within Axim. Full details will be shared with registered missionaries.
en.axim-update5-text: Our children's ministry team is developing a full-week programme for the children of Axim. Watch this space for the curriculum and activities outline.
en.axim-pray-sub: Prayer is the engine of every mission. Here are specific things to bring before God for Axim 2026.
en.axim-prayer1: Safety and divine protection for every missionary travelling to and serving in Axim.
en.axim-prayer2: Open hearts in Axim — that the community receives the Gospel with eagerness and faith.
en.axim-prayer3: Provision — that all fundraising goals are met and supplies flow abundantly.
en.axim-prayer4: Healing miracles in the medical outreach — signs and wonders that declare Christ is alive.
en.axim-prayer5: The children of Axim — that seeds planted in their hearts bear fruit for generations.
en.axim-prayer6: Revival — that this mission sparks a lasting spiritual awakening in the Western Region.
en.axim-team-sub: Trusted, experienced, and passionate — the leadership team behind the Axim 2026 Mission.
en.axim-fcta-sub: Every soul won in Axim is a shared victory. Whether you go, give, or pray — your obedience advances the Kingdom. Don't let this moment pass you by.
en.axim-footer-brand-desc: Zoe Tirzah is a welcoming community of faith dedicated to loving God and loving others. Join us as we explore God's Word, experience His presence, and serve our world.
en.axim-footer-copy: © 2020 Reg. Mission in Ghana & Beyond (1175049) and Scotland (SCO48330).

fr.axim-hero-verse: "Qu'ils sont beaux les pieds de ceux qui annoncent de bonnes nouvelles !" — Romains 10:15
fr.axim-hero-desc: En août, Zoe Tirzah apporte l'Évangile sur les côtes historiques d'Axim dans la région occidentale du Ghana — évangélisation, soins médicaux, service communautaire et ministère auprès des enfants en une semaine de mission.
fr.axim-about-body1: Axim est l'une des plus anciennes villes du Ghana, située sur la magnifique côte ouest. Malgré son riche passé, de nombreuses communautés restent encore non atteintes par la pleine puissance de l'Évangile.
fr.axim-about-body2: Zoe Tirzah voit Axim comme une porte stratégique où des racines profondes pour Christ peuvent influencer toute la région occidentale et au-delà.
fr.axim-pillars-h2: Les quatre piliers de la mission d'Axim
fr.axim-pillars-sub: Chaque activité est un acte d'amour intentionnel — esprit, âme et corps.
fr.axim-pillar1-text: Croisades en plein air, porte-à-porte et services d'église apportant le message du Christ.
fr.axim-pillar2-text: Consultations et soins gratuits pour les familles défavorisées.
fr.axim-pillar3-text: Distribution de vêtements, nourriture et produits essentiels.
fr.axim-pillar4-text: Programmes dédiés pour enfants avec musique, histoires bibliques et activités.
fr.axim-fund-body: Chaque don finance directement la mission.
fr.axim-donate-sub: Choisissez un montant pour soutenir la mission.
fr.axim-gallery-sub: Un aperçu de la mission en action
fr.axim-pray-sub: La prière est le moteur de la mission.

ar.axim-hero-desc: في أغسطس، تحمل زوي تيرزا الإنجيل إلى شواطئ أكزيم التاريخية في المنطقة الغربية من غانا — تبشير، رعاية طبية، خدمة مجتمعية، وخدمة للأطفال خلال أسبوع واحد.
ar.axim-about-body1: أكزيم هي واحدة من أقدم مدن غانا وتقع على الساحل الغربي الجميل.
ar.axim-about-body2: ترى زوي تيرزا أن أكزيم بوابة استراتيجية لزرع الإيمان.
ar.axim-pillar1-text: حمل رسالة المسيح في الشوارع والبيوت.
